title: Totally Patriotic (The Emperor's New Clothes album)

'''''Totally Patriotic''''' was an album by [[The Emperor's New Clothes]]. It and [[Totally Patriotic (The Emperor's New Clothes song)|its title track]] were later parodied by [[Red Shift Limit/Legends|Red Shift Limit]].

==Track listing==
*"[[Defending Your Freedom]]"
*"[[Star Destroyer (song)|Star Destroyer]]"
*"[[Supremacy (song)|Supremacy]]"
*"[[The New Order]]"
*"[[Totally Patriotic (The Emperor's New Clothes song)|Totally Patriotic]]"
